meta.title: Daniele Pescatore – Software Engineer & Innovation Manager | Benevento
meta.description: Daniele Pescatore is a Software Engineer, Innovation Manager and Computer Science teacher based in Benevento. Specializing in safety-critical systems, Emergency Management, WebGIS, microservices, funded research projects and specialized consulting on public procurement and Consip for the Italian Public Administration.
meta.og.title: Daniele Pescatore – Software Engineer & Innovation Manager
meta.og.description: Software Engineer, Innovation Manager and Computer Science teacher with over 10 years of experience in emergency management, WebGIS, digital innovation, European projects and consulting on public procurement and Consip in the Italian Public Administration.
meta.twitter.description: Software Engineer, Innovation Manager and Computer Science teacher with experience in safety-critical systems, Emergency Management, WebGIS, funded research and consulting on public procurement and Consip.
hero.sub: Software Engineer, Innovation Manager and Computer Science teacher in Benevento. For over 10 years I have been working on enterprise and safety-critical systems, Emergency Management, WebGIS, funded research projects and consulting on public procurement in the Italian Public Administration.
about.title: Build. Teach. Innovate.
about.p1: Computer Science Engineer with a Master's degree from the University of Sannio, I have been working for over 10 years on enterprise and safety-critical software systems for Emergency Management, funded research projects, and specialized consulting on public procurement in the Italian Public Administration.
about.p2: I currently hold the dual role of Software Analyst & Innovation Manager and teacher in upper secondary schools, where I teach Computer Science, Systems and Networks, Information Systems Design and Technologies, and Project Management and Business Organization. My background has been enriched by international experiences in Turkey, Greece, Austria, Germany, Finland, and Ireland.
about.p3: I served as community manager for DevDay Benevento (300+ members), speaker at conferences and university seminars, and have always been passionate about technology applied to the real world.
about.p4: Between jazz piano and a love of travel, I nurture creativity and curiosity — key elements in how I design and work with technology.
about.tl1.title: Software Analyst & Innovation Manager
about.tl1.desc: Freelance consultant for Beta 80 Group. Developing web systems for Emergency Management and managing technological innovation.
about.tl2.title: Computer Science Teacher
about.tl2.desc: National STEM competition winner. IIS Carafa Giustiniani, Cerreto Sannita. Subjects: Computer Science, Systems and Networks, Information Systems Design and Technologies, Project Management and Business Organization.
about.tl3.title: Proxy Product Owner – Crisis Management
about.tl3.desc: Beta 80 Group. Safety-critical product architecture: 118 emergency dispatch, COVID data, Italian Red Cross National Operations Room.
about.tl4.title: Software Analyst & Team Leader
about.tl4.desc: Beta 80 Group. Integrated .NET system for 118 emergency dispatch and real-time fleet management. Thesis co-advisor at Unisannio.
about.tl5.title: Software Developer – R&D & ICT
about.tl5.desc: Beta 80 Group. eHealth, Smart Cities, Documentum document management systems, WebGIS with PostGIS and OpenLayers.
services.title: Services
services.card1.title: Web Development, Software Architecture & Microservices
services.card1.desc: Analysis, design and development of software systems including enterprise-grade solutions: Web Applications, backend, REST microservices, integration with Oracle and SQL Server, performance tuning and application modernization.
services.card2.title: Innovation, Public Procurement & Funded Projects
services.card2.desc: Technical support for innovation and digital transformation: public tenders and CONSIP, technical specifications and evaluations, presales engineering, project documentation and contributions for ERDF, H2020 and research grants.
services.card3.title: IT Training, Teaching & Workshops
services.card3.desc: Courses, workshops and tutoring on computer science, AI and vibe coding, software development, Agile methodologies and project management. Activities aimed at schools, companies, professionals and technical teams.
services.card4.title: AI Integration & AI-Assisted Development
services.card4.desc: Integration of LLMs and AI tools into delivery workflows: agentic workflows, prompt engineering and team mentoring to accelerate development, analysis and documentation.
services.card5.title: Safety-Critical Systems & Emergency Management
services.card5.desc: Design and development of mission-critical solutions for rescue operations and emergency management: 118 dispatch, operations rooms, real-time fleet management and crisis management.
services.card6.title: WebGIS & Geolocation
services.card6.desc: Design of web-based GIS systems with PostGIS, GeoServer, OpenLayers and Leaflet. Interoperable mapping solutions based on WMS/WFS standards for emergency, territorial management and Smart City applications.
portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.p1.title: Integrated 118 System & Fleet Management
portfolio.p1.desc: Safety-critical platform for real-time management of medical emergencies and fleet monitoring. System architect and team leader.
portfolio.p2.title: National Operations Room – Red Cross
portfolio.p2.desc: Operations system for managing emergencies and COVID-19 data for the Italian Red Cross. Product Owner and architecture lead.
portfolio.p3.title: SmartCity Platform & WebGIS
portfolio.p3.desc: Full-stack applications for Smart Cities on MEAN stack and WebGIS system with PostGIS, GeoServer and OpenLayers for public entities.
portfolio.p4.title: ESEO Project – ESA Satellite
portfolio.p4.desc: Participation in the inter-university ESEO project by ESA, successfully launched on December 3, 2018 aboard a SpaceX Falcon 9. ESA Academy initiative involving 10 European universities and over 600 students.
portfolio.p5.title: Smart Health 2.0
portfolio.p5.desc: Research and Development project in healthcare focused on e-health, telemedicine and Electronic Health Record 2.0. Co-funded initiative under the Smart Cities and Communities / PON Research and Competitiveness program.
portfolio.p6.title: i-TRIER
portfolio.p6.desc: Innovative digital triage system for Emergency Medical Services and Civil Protection, focused on interoperability, victim tracking, CAD and health data integration in mass casualty scenarios.
